narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,180 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
